sourceScope.sourceReference: American Academy of Actuaries practice note, September 2017
sourceScope.sourceStatusNote: Non-binding practice note / companion guidance; not authoritative regulatory text.

observedSectionWindows.note: Front matter, disclaimer, introduction, and Section A background.
Section B procedures and the Section C opener.
Section C continuation and Section D modeling considerations.
Section D continuation and Section E/F asset modeling detail.
Sections G/H/I/J on policy cash flow risk, expenses, reliance, and results.
Sections K/L and Appendix A on opinion, memorandum, AG43 / VM-21 impacts, and acronyms.

boundaries: Keep planning focused on this single practice note file.
Do not widen into the other Practice Notes files in the same folder.
Keep VM-20, VM-21, VM-22, VM-30, VM-31, AG, and regulation references review-only unless a batch intentionally includes the referenced operational text.
Keep the disclaimer and the non-binding status visible as companion-guidance context, not as authoritative regulatory text.
Use page locators as the primary citation anchor; line references are not expected for this PDF slice.
exclusions: No full-document processing outside this source file.
No eLearning scripts, slides, quizzes, or app exports.
No raw source files in Git.
No other Practice Notes files in the same wave.

topicMap.sectionFamily: Front matter, disclaimer, introduction, and Section A background

proposedBatches.title: Front matter, disclaimer, introduction, and Section A background
proposedBatches.boundaryRationale: Keep the disclaimer, introduction, and Section A background together before the appointed-actuary procedures begin.
proposedBatches.reviewOnlyGate: Keep review-only and do not promote any item.

proposedBatches.title: Appointed-actuary procedures and Section C opener
proposedBatches.boundaryRationale: Keep appointed-actuary procedures and early general considerations together before the deeper modeling sections begin.
proposedBatches.reviewOnlyGate: Keep review-only and do not promote any item.

proposedBatches.title: General modeling considerations and IMR / AVR treatment
proposedBatches.boundaryRationale: Keep the general modeling discussion together, including IMR / AVR and related modeling considerations.
proposedBatches.reviewOnlyGate: Keep review-only and do not promote any item.

proposedBatches.title: Asset modeling specifics, fixed income, and mortgages
proposedBatches.boundaryRationale: Keep the asset modeling detail together so fixed-income and mortgage topics do not spill into later sections.
proposedBatches.reviewOnlyGate: Keep review-only and do not promote any item.

proposedBatches.title: Policy cash flow risk, expenses, reliance, and results
proposedBatches.boundaryRationale: Keep policy cash flow risk, expenses, reliance, and analysis of results together as one risk-and-results slice.
proposedBatches.reviewOnlyGate: Keep review-only and do not promote any item.

proposedBatches.title: Opinion, memorandum, AG43 / VM-21 impacts, and appendix closeout
proposedBatches.boundaryRationale: Keep opinion / memorandum preparation and AG43 / VM-21 impact material together with the appendix closeout.
proposedBatches.reviewOnlyGate: Keep review-only and do not promote any item.

notes: Use page locators as the primary anchor because line references are not expected for this PDF slice.
Keep the non-binding practice-note caveat visible in the review packet and review index.
Treat references to AOMR, ASOP 7, ASOP 11, ASOP 22, ASOP 23, ASOP 41, AG43 / VM-21, and AG38 as cross-reference material unless the operational text is captured in the same batch.

appReadyCriteria: sanitized, stable, and versioned for the app thread
ragReadyCriteria: review status no longer requires human disposition

futureChecks: synchronize scripts/asset-adequacy-analysis-batch-definitions.mjs with the planned batch IDs
keep one topic window per batch
validationImplications.portabilityNote: Keep the plan separate from VM-20, VM-21, VM-22, and the other Practice Notes files so the processor stays portable across source families.

operatingNote: This source is companion guidance, not authoritative regulatory text. The wave should remain review-only until a later human decision explicitly changes the status.
